mapper.select: SELECT ticket_id, user_id, NULL AS username, prefer_dimension, prefer_value, avoid_dimension, avoid_value, preference_strength, detail_text, status, created_at, updated_at FROM user_feedback_tickets WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY created_at DESC, ticket_id DESC

SELECT ticket_id, user_id, NULL AS username, prefer_dimension, prefer_value, avoid_dimension, avoid_value, preference_strength, detail_text, status, created_at, updated_at FROM user_feedback_tickets WHERE status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY user_id ASC, created_at DESC, ticket_id DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_feedback_tickets WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_feedback_tickets ( user_id, prefer_dimension, prefer_value, avoid_dimension, avoid_value, preference_strength, detail_text, status, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{preferDimension}, #{preferValue}, #{avoidDimension}, #{avoidValue}, #{preferenceStrength}, #{detailText}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW() )
